outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump vows to sink Iranian ships approaching a U.S. blockade of Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: NPR covers Pope Leo XIV brushes off Trump criticism, continues peace calls. Vatican-US tensions escalate over Iran war.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Trump warns Iran as US military blockade on Iranian ports takes effect
outlets.summary: CNN covers CENTCOM blockade in effect, Trump 'eliminate' threat, China weapons intel, Erdogan war crimes accusation, Guterres 'wider war' warning.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US blockade of Iranian ports begins Monday, CENTCOM confirms
outlets.summary: Fox covers Iran's president Pezeshkian says deal still possible if US abandons 'totalitarianism.' Live updates on blockade and Iran response.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump threatens Iranian ships as the US imposes blockade on ports
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump 'eliminate' threat. Gen. Keane warns Iran 'overplayed their hand.' Iran embassy posts AI-generated pirate meme of Trump/Vance/Hegseth.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump claims Tehran wants a deal amid US blockade of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera Day 46 liveblog: CENTCOM blockade takes effect. Chinese tanker tests it. IDF encircles Bint Jbeil. Netanyahu backs blockade. Anti-blockade protests in Tehran.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: US naval blockade of Iranian ports takes effect as Chinese tanker tests it
outlets.summary: BBC/Bloomberg covers blockade implementation. Oil pulls back from highs. Pakistan pushing Round 2 US-Iran talks for April 16. OPEC production plunged 27%.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Vance says next step up to Iran as US blockade takes effect
outlets.summary: JPost covers Vance 'economic terrorism' accusation. Sgt. Maj. Bianco KIA in Lebanon. 8 IDF soldiers wounded by Hezbollah drone. Iran central bank warns of 180% inflation.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: Iran ceasefire could end at any moment, we back Trump's blockade
outlets.summary: Netanyahu backs blockade at cabinet meeting. IDF close to capturing Bint Jbeil — 100+ Hezbollah killed. Rubio hosts Israel-Lebanon ambassador talks. Holocaust Remembrance Day ceremony.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: IRGC says to use new capabilities if conflict continues
outlets.summary: Xinhua/PressTV carries IRGC vow to unveil capabilities 'the enemy has no idea about.' Calls US blockade 'piracy.' Pezeshkian: Hormuz threats have 'widespread consequences.' Tehran anti-blockade protests.

outlets.name: Xinhua/Iran
outlets.headline: Iran's IRGC says to use new capabilities if conflict continues
outlets.summary: Xinhua covers IRGC warning. Iran central bank warns of 180% inflation and economic collapse. Pezeshkian tells Macron: US 'excessive demands' prevented agreement. Anti-blockade rallies in Tehran.
